subject: A massive hunched bestial creature crouching in a foggy swamp forest, clawed hands extended, surrounded by dead trees and scattered embers
description: A large, hulking creature occupies most of the frame, hunched low over the root-covered swamp floor. The creature has a roughly humanoid body shape but is massive in scale — its wide frame and long arms suggest enormous physical power. Its hands are splayed with visible claws and it appears to be crouching in a predatory or resting pose atop or beside a large mound. The surrounding environment is a misty, dead forest: bare and gnarled trees reach overhead, fog fills the mid-ground, and scattered points of orange ember-light float through the scene. The palette is overwhelmingly cold and desaturated — grays, dark greens, and muted browns — punctuated by the warm orange sparks. The mood is swamp-horror, isolation, and lurking threat.
foreground: Massive hunched bestial creature with clawed hands crouching low, large mound beneath it
background: Foggy swamp forest with dead bare trees and floating orange ember sparks
emotion: Lurking, predatory — low crouch, claws spread, no readable face; body language is tension before pounce
